Tools

Utility functions and load-cycle helpers.

Module providing some useful auxiliary functions.

class marapendi.tools.tools.Updatable[source]

Bases: object

update_from_dict(params: Dict[str, Any]) → None[source]

Recursively update cell properties from a nested dictionary.

marapendi.tools.tools.arrhenius_term(activation_energy, temperature, reference_temperature)[source]
marapendi.tools.tools.polyval_vec(coeffs, xs)[source]

Vectorised polyval: evaluate one polynomial per row.

Parameters:

  • coeffs ((N, D) array — N polynomials, each of degree D-1,) – coefficients in descending order (like np.polyval)

  • xs ((N,) array — one evaluation point per polynomial)

Return type:

(N,) array of evaluated values

marapendi.tools.tools.potential_activation(transfer_coefficient, electron_number, temperature, potential_difference)[source]
marapendi.tools.tools.sigmoid(x, x_inflection, slope_parameter)[source]
